regions.group_name: 减速比 3~10 尺寸图 - 输入端

classification.category_basis: 用于识别机械结构尺寸类图纸，包括电机/零部件外形轮廓、长宽高、轴径、轴长、键槽、法兰、安装孔、孔距、定位尺寸、三视图、剖视图、局部放大视图、公差、形位公差、基准符号、连接器/线缆/插头的物理安装位置或外形位置。若图中仅展示连接器型号、端子型号、线束走向、接口外形位置，但没有明确的引脚编号、针脚功能、线色或接线表，也归入本类。
classification.reason: 目标框对应完整图中右侧黄色标记的输入端视图，包含端面轮廓、安装孔、中心孔、中心线、引出线和尺寸代号'C2'、'ΦC1'、'Φ80'、'C7'，用于表达机械安装与外形尺寸关系，不含针脚功能或性能曲线。

text_annotations.correction_note: Normalized diameter symbol from OCR ∅ to Φ; retained separate label because ocr_002 overlaps duplicate combined reading.
Normalized diameter symbol from OCR ∅ to Φ; retained separate label because ocr_002 overlaps duplicate combined reading.

terminology_notes: Diameter symbol ∅ normalized to engineering notation Φ.
translation_notes: Input translated as 输入端 for engineering summary only.

dimension_records.reason: Visible English label identifies this cropped view as the input side, not a dimensional value.
Leader points to a circular hole feature; value is a symbolic dimensional code rather than a numeric size in this crop.
Visible diameter callout with leader to circular geometry; numeric value is explicitly shown.
Leader points to the corner mounting hole feature; label is a dimensional code defined elsewhere.
Dimension line spans the bottom width of the input-end flange; label is the visible dimensional code C7.

engineering_summary.mounting_interface: Input-side flange shows mounting hole code C2 and circular feature code ΦC1.
engineering_summary.shaft_and_key_interface: No shaft or keyway dimensional text is available from OCR in this crop.
engineering_summary.overall_envelope_and_clearance: Visible envelope-related callouts include Φ80 and bottom span code C7.
engineering_summary.connector_considerations: No connector-related text is available from OCR in this crop.
engineering_summary.missing_or_unresolved_data: Numeric table values for C1, C2 and C7 are not present in the target crop; they remain symbolic codes only.

unresolved_items.reason: Duplicate combined OCR reading overlapping separate higher-utility readings ocr_004 and ocr_003; not used to avoid reusing the same visual text twice.

classification.category_basis: 用于识别机械结构尺寸类图纸，包括电机/零部件外形轮廓、长宽高、轴径、轴长、键槽、法兰、安装孔、孔距、定位尺寸、三视图、剖视图、局部放大视图、公差、形位公差、基准符号、连接器/线缆/插头的物理安装位置或外形位置。若图中仅展示连接器型号、端子型号、线束走向、接口外形位置，但没有明确的引脚编号、针脚功能、线色或接线表，也归入本类。
classification.reason: 目标裁剪位于完整标注源图左侧蓝框的'输出 Output'视图，展示减速机输出端法兰、安装孔、轴向侧视轮廓及尺寸标注，如'L1'、'ΦD1'、'ΦD2'、'ΦD7'、'ΦC3'、'ΦC5'、'C4'、'C6'、'C8'和'45°'，属于外形、孔径、孔距和安装定位尺寸表达。

dimension_records.reason: Visible text labels this view as the output side.
Diameter symbol and C-series parameter identify an output-side cylindrical dimension.

Vertical dimension label beside the upper housing is visually C6, though OCR misread it.
Vertical dimension label C8 is attached to the right-side height dimension.
Rightmost vertical dimension spans a larger height and is labeled C4.
Leader points to a mounting hole and the callout uses a diameter symbol.
Left-side angular dimension indicates a 45 degree mounting hole position.
Second left-side angular dimension indicates another 45 degree mounting hole position.
Leader points to the circular mounting-hole pattern and uses diameter D1.
Leader points to the lower mounting outside feature and uses diameter D7.
Bottom horizontal dimension spans the square mounting face and visible callout includes square symbol L1.

engineering_summary.mounting_interface: Mounting interface includes ΦD2 mounting holes, ΦD1 bolt circle or related diameter, ΦD7 outside diameter, two 45° angular callouts, and □L1 square mounting face width.
engineering_summary.shaft_and_key_interface: Output-side cylindrical interface dimensions are identified as ΦC5 and ΦC3; numeric values are parameterized and not specified in this cropped drawing.
engineering_summary.overall_envelope_and_clearance: Envelope-related parameters C4, C6, and C8 are visible as vertical dimensions; numeric values are not specified.
engineering_summary.connector_considerations: The view is explicitly labeled Output; no electrical connector callout is visible in this crop.
engineering_summary.missing_or_unresolved_data: Only symbolic parameters are visible; actual numeric dimensional values and tolerances are not specified in this region.

unresolved_items.issue: OCR fragments or line/feature misreads with no reliable standalone engineering text; omitted from final annotations.

classification.category_basis: 用于识别机械结构尺寸类图纸，包括电机/零部件外形轮廓、长宽高、轴径、轴长、键槽、法兰、安装孔、孔距、定位尺寸、三视图、剖视图、局部放大视图、公差、形位公差、基准符号、连接器/线缆/插头的物理安装位置或外形位置。若图中仅展示连接器型号、端子型号、线束走向、接口外形位置，但没有明确的引脚编号、针脚功能、线色或接线表，也归入本类。
classification.reason: 目标裁剪区域在完整标注源图中对应绿色框内的侧视尺寸图，包含电机与减速机外形轮廓、轴端、安装结构以及'C9'、'C10'、'L2'、'L3'、'L4'、'L5'、'L6'、'L7'、'L8'、'ΦD3h6'、'ΦD5'、'ΦD4g6'等尺寸与公差标注，属于机械结构尺寸表达。

text_annotations.correction_note: OCR read only a fragment as 6; visible vertical dimension label is C9.
Normalized diameter symbol from ∅ to Φ.
Normalized diameter symbol from ∅ to Φ.

terminology_notes: Symbolic dimensions such as C9, C10, L2-L8, D3, D4, and D5 require a dimensional table for numeric values.

dimension_records.normalized_specification_zh: C10 表格定义尺寸；数值未标注

dimension_records.normalized_specification_zh: C9 表格定义尺寸；数值未标注
dimension_records.reason: C9 is a symbolic vertical overall dimension; OCR captured it incompletely but the visible label corresponds to C9.

dimension_records.normalized_specification_zh: L2 表格定义尺寸；数值未标注
dimension_records.reason: L2 is a horizontal symbolic length callout at the right side of the drawing.

dimension_records.normalized_specification_en: L3 table-defined dimension; numeric value Not specified
dimension_records.normalized_specification_zh: L3 表格定义尺寸；数值未标注
dimension_records.reason: L3 is a short horizontal symbolic length callout near the right extension dimensions.

dimension_records.normalized_specification_en: L5 table-defined dimension; numeric value Not specified
dimension_records.normalized_specification_zh: L5 表格定义尺寸；数值未标注
dimension_records.reason: L5 is placed along the shaft region and denotes an axial shaft/interface length.

dimension_records.normalized_specification_en: L6 table-defined dimension; numeric value Not specified
dimension_records.normalized_specification_zh: L6 表格定义尺寸；数值未标注
dimension_records.reason: L6 is a short axial callout at the shaft end.

dimension_records.normalized_specification_en: L4 table-defined dimension; numeric value Not specified
dimension_records.normalized_specification_zh: L4 表格定义尺寸；数值未标注
dimension_records.reason: L4 is a short axial length callout near the shoulder/end face.

dimension_records.normalized_specification_en: L7 table-defined dimension; numeric value Not specified
dimension_records.normalized_specification_zh: L7 表格定义尺寸；数值未标注
dimension_records.reason: L7 is a short horizontal length callout near the lower right end feature.

dimension_records.normalized_specification_en: L8 table-defined dimension; numeric value Not specified
dimension_records.normalized_specification_zh: L8 表格定义尺寸；数值未标注
dimension_records.reason: L8 is the long bottom horizontal overall length callout.

dimension_records.normalized_specification_zh: 直径 D5 表格定义尺寸；数值未标注

dimension_records.reason: ΦD4g6 is a vertical diameter callout on the outer shaft/interface diameter.

engineering_summary.mounting_interface: Visible symbolic housing/envelope dimensions include C9 and C10; numeric values are not specified in this crop.
engineering_summary.shaft_and_key_interface: Visible shaft/interface callouts include L4, L5, L6, L7, ΦD3h6, ΦD5, and ΦD4g6; numeric values are table-defined but not shown.
engineering_summary.overall_envelope_and_clearance: Overall or envelope-related symbolic dimensions include L2, L3, L8, C9, and C10.
engineering_summary.connector_considerations: No connector text or connector-specific callout is visible in the OCR source boxes.
engineering_summary.missing_or_unresolved_data: Numeric dimensional table values for all symbolic callouts are not present in the target crop.

unresolved_items.issue: Likely duplicate/noise OCR overlapping the vertical C10 label; not retained as an independent annotation.
Low-confidence isolated A without reliable engineering callout context; not retained.
Overlapping low-confidence structure/noise readings near internal geometry; not retained.
Low-confidence isolated digit 7 likely from linework/noise; not retained.
Isolated A near shaft area without reliable visible datum or callout context; not retained.

classification.category_basis: 用于识别机械结构尺寸类图纸，包括电机/零部件外形轮廓、长宽高、轴径、轴长、键槽、法兰、安装孔、孔距、定位尺寸、三视图、剖视图、局部放大视图、公差、形位公差、基准符号、连接器/线缆/插头的物理安装位置或外形位置。若图中仅展示连接器型号、端子型号、线束走向、接口外形位置，但没有明确的引脚编号、针脚功能、线色或接线表，也归入本类。
classification.reason: 目标框为尺寸图中的局部机械结构视图，包含孔径深度标注'D6深(depth)L9'、宽度或键槽类尺寸'B1h9'及位置尺寸'H1'，并有圆孔、中心线、尺寸箭头和引出线，表达安装或加工尺寸。

text_annotations.correction_note: Merged adjacent OCR boxes into one hole depth callout; no additional visible text was added beyond OCR source text.

terminology_notes: Symbolic dimension codes such as B1, D6, L9, and H1 are preserved because numeric table values are not visible in the target image.
translation_notes: (depth) is interpreted as hole depth wording for the D6/L9 callout.

dimension_records.reason: Vertical dimension callout B1h9 is associated with the left-side slot/keyway-like feature; the actual numeric value is table-defined and not visible in this crop.
D6 and (depth)L9 share the same leader pointing to the central hole and form one engineering hole-depth callout.
H1 is shown as an independent bottom dimension between extension lines; the numeric value is not visible in the cropped drawing.

engineering_summary.shaft_and_key_interface: Visible symbolic keyway-related callout B1h9 is present, but numeric size is not specified in the target image.
engineering_summary.overall_envelope_and_clearance: H1 is visible as a symbolic bottom dimension; actual value is not specified in the target image.
engineering_summary.missing_or_unresolved_data: Numeric values for B1, D6, L9, and H1 are not visible in the target image and must be obtained from the dimensional table or other drawing data.

quality_control.origin_src_semantics: 5x crop before structure border trim; backend original data image
quality_control.target_src_semantics: structure-only crop after border trim; backend processed data image

items: 抽查 5x 裁切图清晰度和结构图去边效果
抽查 AI 命名、分类、标签合并、完整翻译和简单翻译质量
抽查 v2 JSON 是否满足后台拆解对比和人工复核需要
